summary: Completed comprehensive testing of MAJOR RESTRUCTURE: Authentication system + Home page with feature cards + Protected routes. Backend APIs 84.6% successful (11/13 tests), frontend authentication flow 100% successful with excellent navigation and premium feature integration.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Request timeout after 45 seconds during LLM generation
flaky_endpoints.impact: Birth chart generation fails for users

ui_bugs.issue: Zodiac sign cards not clickable - CSS selector not finding elements

design_issues.issue: Theme toggle button not easily discoverable in UI
